description: The force will be strong in your little Jedi when they wear these awesome Star Wars pyjamas! This pack of two includes two designs - a long sleeve black top with the slogan 'Someday I Will Be The Most Powerful Jedi Ever' paired with grey pyjama bottoms, and a grey short sleeve top showcasing Darth Vader against a stripey background and the 'Star Wars' logo in black, paired with black pj shorts. In these cool jammies, your little trooper will have the most adventurous dreams!
